allow: Bash(node "$HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" commit "docs: add Google Analytics performance data requirements" --files .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md)

Bash(node "$HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state record-session \\
  --stopped-at "Phase 1 context gathered" \\
  --resume-file ".planning/phases/01-foundation/01-CONTEXT.md" 2>&1
node "$HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" commit "docs\(state\): record phase 1 context session" --files ".planning/STATE.md" 2>&1)
Bash(node "$HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" commit "docs\(01\): add validation strategy" --files ".planning/phases/01-foundation/01-VALIDATION.md" 2>/dev/null; echo "done")
Bash(node "$HOME/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" init plan-phase "01-foundation" 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "gsd-tools not available")
